title: Completing your tax return
description: Complete the total deductions section of your tax return.

content_blocks.text: Go to TOTAL DEDUCTIONS on page 4 of your tax return.
Check that you have shown all your deductions.

Add up the deductions you claimed at items D1 to D10 and D on page 4 of your tax return. If you did not use the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2011 you will not have an amount at D .
Write the answer at TOTAL DEDUCTIONS on your tax return.

rows: Where to go next go to Subtotal return to main menu Tax return for individuals instructions go back to Deductions that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return

content_text:
Go to TOTAL DEDUCTIONS on page 4 of your tax return.
### Step 1
Check that you have shown all your deductions.
### Step 2
Add up the deductions you claimed at items D1 to D10 and D on page 4 of your tax return. If you did not use the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2011 you will not have an amount at D .
### Step 3
Write the answer at TOTAL DEDUCTIONS on your tax return.
Where to go next go to Subtotal return to main menu Tax return for individuals instructions go back to Deductions that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return
